sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Variable Jump Height
special_mechanics.description: Players can repeatedly hit the jump button to slow down Chuck's descent during a jump, allowing control over jump height

physics_values.descent_slowdown: qualitative - button repeating reduces fall speed

special_mechanics.name: Skull Power-up
special_mechanics.description: Chuck can collect a skull power-up that sits on his shoulders and can be thrown at enemies. Functions like a boomerang and returns to Chuck regardless of what it hits

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative empirical data only. Game mechanics documented but specific physics values not quantified in available sources. Known features: variable jump height via button hold, boomerang skull projectile mechanic, multi-hit health system (up to 5 hearts per life). No technical movement data (speeds, acceleration, gravity values) documented.
sources_used: wikipedia - Decap Attack gameplay mechanics section
